<internal_defines>
SIMD_HWAES -> 20260322
</internal_defines>

<module_info>
name -> "SIMD hardware AES support"
</module_info>

<header:internal>
simd_hwaes.h
</header:internal>

<requires>
simd_4x32
</requires>

<isa>
x86_32:aesni
x86_64:aesni
x32:aesni
arm64:armv8crypto
</isa>

<arch>
x86_32
x86_64
x32
arm64
</arch>
